# CLI Anything Hub MCP

Paid remote MCP for CLI tool MCP, structured receipts, usage logs, and audit-ready evidence for agent and CI workflows.

Website: https://clianythingharness.clauxel.com/
MCP endpoint: https://clianythingharness.clauxel.com/mcp
Server card: https://clianythingharness.clauxel.com/server-card.json
Docs: https://github.com/clauxel/cli-anything-hub-mcp

Use case: CLI Anything Hub remote MCP for CLI tool MCP.
Authentication: Bearer token required for production use.
Tools: cli_tool_list, cli_command_run, cli_schema_validate, cli_result_receipt
